title: TC-01 - Logo: site-specific redirect (core)
steps: <steps id="0" last="3"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ in Chrome.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Header loads and PGL logo is visible top-left.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Click the PGL logo.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Browser navigates to https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ (site homepage) and page title matches expected homepage title.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Repeat for https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ and https://jobs.qa.pgl.co.uk/.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Each logo click navigates to the respective site's staging homepage.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-02 - Menu visual conformance (desktop, 1366x768)
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ at desktop viewport 1366x768.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Header menu spacing, fonts, icons and colours match reference screenshot from AssetsForDev.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Capture screenshot and compare to reference.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Visual diff within accepted tolerance or discrepancies logged as defects.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-03 - Hover / submenu behavior (desktop)
steps: <steps id="0" last="3"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ in Chrome.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Page loads with header present.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Hover the top-level menu item 'Holidays' (or equivalent).</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Submenu appears within 1s; no console JS errors.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Move pointer into submenu and interact.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Submenu remains visible while interacting and closes on pointer leave.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-04 - Mobile: hamburger, expand/collapse and navigation
steps: <steps id="0" last="3"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/ in mobile emulator (375x812) or device.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Page loads with hamburger icon visible.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Tap hamburger to open menu.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Menu opens and items are tappable.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Tap a parent item to expand children, then tap a leaf link 'Activities'.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Navigation to expected page succeeds (HTTP 200) and page content heading matches expected.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-05 - Keyboard accessibility: focus and navigation
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ and press Tab until header/menu gains focus.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Header interactive elements receive focus in logical order.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">With a top-level item focused press Enter to open submenu; use Arrow keys to navigate and Enter to activate.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Submenu opens via keyboard; Arrow keys move focus; Enter activates the focused link.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-06 - Screen reader semantics (NVDA)
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Start NVDA and open https://familyadventures.qa.pgl.co.uk/.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">NVDA announces page load.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Navigate to the menu and open items using NVDA navigation keys.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">ARIA roles and expanded/collapsed states are announced; menu usable by screen reader.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-07 - Focus visibility & contrast
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Tab through header elements and confirm a visible focus indicator is present for each interactive control.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Focus indicator is clearly visible for each control.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Run a contrast check for menu text vs background (Axe or WCAG checker).</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Contrast ratio meets WCAG AA (>=4.5:1 for normal text).</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-08 - Responsive breakpoints & boundary checks
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Resize viewport to widths: 1280, 1024, 768, 600, 375 and check header layout.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Header adapts correctly; no overlap/truncation.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Test at boundary widths e.g. 767 and 769, 599 and 601.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">No layout break at -1px/+1px boundaries.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-09 - Link integrity and navigation
steps: <steps id="0" last="1"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Click each top-level and submenu link from https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Each destination returns HTTP 200 and page heading/title matches expected.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-10 - Auth-dependent menu items
steps: <steps id="0" last="3"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Confirm menu when signed out on https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Signed-out menu items visible as expected.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Log in as testuser+ts01@pgl.co.uk / Password1! and observe menu.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Signed-in menu shows user-specific items; role-based differences visible if applicable.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Log out and confirm menu returns to signed-out state.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Menu returns to signed-out view; logo redirect unchanged.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-11 - Header config mapping verification
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open header mapping in CMS or mapping file and confirm logo target URL for each site.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">CMS mapping lists correct homepage targets for each site entry.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Click logo on staging and confirm runtime redirect matches CMS mapping.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Runtime behavior matches CMS mapping.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-12 - Negative: JS/CSS failure resilience
steps: <steps id="0" last="2"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Block header JS resource in DevTools and reload https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Essential navigation remains reachable where possible; console errors captured for dev triage.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Restore resource and verify normal behavior.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Header/menu returns to normal behavior after resource restored.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>

title: TC-13 - Footer: content, links, branding and accessibility
steps: <steps id="0" last="3"><step id="1" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Open https://www.qa.pgl.co.uk/ and scroll to footer.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Footer matches design: columns, logos, certification badge and phone number present.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="2" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Click each footer link and confirm HTTP 200 and expected target.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Footer links navigate to expected pages.</parameterizedString><description/></step><step id="3" type="ValidateStep"><parameterizedString isformatted="true">On mobile viewport confirm tappable areas and stack order.</parameterizedString><parameterizedString isformatted="true">Footer stacks correctly and links are tappable on mobile.</parameterizedString><description/></step></steps>
